generated_oml:
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor for permafrost monitoring with ±0.1°C accuracy"

]

]

    DTDFVocab:producedData StrainDataTransmitted
]

    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

    DTDFVocab:producedData DisplacementDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance MoistureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SoilMoistureSensor
]

instance StrainDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralStrainSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance DisplacementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GroundDisplacementSensor
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelSimulationEngine
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelSimulationEngine
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelSimulationEngine
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelSimulationEngine
]

instance SubsidencePredictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelSimulationEngine
]

instance RawTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted

]

instance ProcessedMoistureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibrated soil moisture content values with spatial interpolation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MoistureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataIngestionPipeline
]

instance StructuralStrainData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData StrainDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataIngestionPipeline
]

instance ClimateEnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated humidity and temperature data with quality flags"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataIngestionPipeline
]

instance DisplacementMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData DisplacementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorDataIngestionPipeline
]

instance SensorDataIngestionPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT-based data ingestion pipeline with 1-second latency for real-time processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, HistoricalDataArchivalService
]

instance ModelSimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-performance computing cluster for running physics-based and ML models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService, ScenarioAnalysisService
]

instance DataVisualizationPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web-based visualization platform with 3D rendering capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringDashboardService, ReportingService
]

instance AlertNotificationSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Multi-channel alert system supporting SMS, email, and push notifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables AnomalyDetectionService, ThresholdAlertService
]

instance DataStorageRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database optimized for sensor data with 10-year retention policy"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataRetrievalService, HistoricalAnalysisService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentEnvironmentalConditionsInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataArchivalService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing long-term storage and retrieval of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataRetentionComplianceInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance ScenarioAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance MonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating PDF/Excel reports with automated distribution"

]

instance AnomalyDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance ThresholdAlertService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service triggering alerts when predefined thresholds are exceeded"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThresholdExceededAlertAction
]

instance DataRetrievalService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides DataAccessibilityInsight
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing trend analysis on multi-year sensor datasets"

]

]

instance DataRetentionComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance FutureEnvironmentalTrendsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance ClimateImpactAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance UserSpecificVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Custom visualization tailored to specific user roles and requirements"
]

instance RegulatoryComplianceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automatically generated reports demonstrating compliance with standards"
]

    base:desc "Automated notification when sensor anomalies are detected"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThresholdExceededAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert when predefined measurement thresholds are exceeded"

]

]
